summary: Excellent sound captures a blistering Terrapin > Dark Star > The Other One performance.
review: The reviewer raves that the recording sounds great and rates the show five stars, highlighting a spectacular Terrapin Station into Dark Star into The Other One sequence. No technical flaws are mentioned, suggesting a clean source, while the musical flow is described as “off the charts.”

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review; both performance and recording are praised heavily, leading to a high rating but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes “Great Sound!” with no complaints about clarity or balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy sequence (Terrapin > Dark Star > The Other One) singled out as a peak moment.
